lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Oh dear, this ship is in a terrible state. And I just can't get the items I need to repair it because Shilo village is overrun with zombies.

sections.title: If the player does not have a ship ticket

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Hello there shipmate! I sail to Khazard Port and to Port Sarim. Where are you bound?

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: I see you don't have a ticket for the ship, my colleague normally only sells them in Shilo village. But I could sell you one for a small additional charge. Shall we say [number] gold pieces

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll buy a ticket for the ship.

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Sorry me old shipmate, but you seem to be financially challenged at the moment. Come back when your coffers are full!

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: It's a good deal and no mistake. Here you go me old shipmate, here's your ticket.

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Ok, now you have your ticket, do you want to sail anywhere?

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Very well then me old shipmate, I'll just take your ticket and then we'll set sail.

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Very well then me old shipmate, I'll just take your ticket and then we'll set sail.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nowhere just at the moment thanks.

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Very well then me old shipmate, Just let me know if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, not just at the moment.

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Very well me old shipmate, come back if you change your mind now.

sections.title: If the player has a ship ticket

lines.speaker: Captain Shanks
lines.text: Hello there shipmate! I sail to Khazard Port and to Port Sarim. Where are you bound?
